changes_made: Changed k8s_pod_disruption_budget_configured to k8s_poddisruptionbudget_configured for consistency with resource naming
Changed k8s_statefulset_ha_configured to k8s_statefulset_replicas_configured for clarity
Changed k8s_node_autoscaler_enabled to k8s_cluster_autoscaler_enabled to reflect the correct resource name
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes and align with the FedRAMP CP-2 (5) control by ensuring continuity of mission and business functions. Naming conventions needed adjustments for consistency and clarity. The changes align the function names with Kubernetes resource terminology and improve specificity.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource names match Kubernetes terminology, such as using 'poddisruptionbudget' without spaces or underscores.
Use 'cluster_autoscaler' instead of 'node_autoscaler' to accurately reflect the Kubernetes component responsible for autoscaling.
title: Contingency Plan | Continue Mission and Business Functions
step1_reasoning: The FedRAMP CP-2 (5) control focuses on ensuring continuity of mission and business functions, which in Kubernetes can be addressed by configuring PodDisruptionBudgets to prevent voluntary disruptions from affecting critical applications, setting appropriate replica counts for Deployments and StatefulSets to ensure high availability, and enabling node autoscaling to handle increased load or failures.
